---
title: 'Oh Yeah...'
date: '2010-03-28T00:37:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2956111900138484806'
blogger_filename: '/2010/03/oh-yeah.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

And... I forgot to mention that the Center gave us Christina's Mexican food for having met our fourth quarter goals. And there has been several Pizza and Sub days due to snow weather in Feb.
